title: OutRequestTeleport
description: ✨ Teleport system RTP-TPA-SetHome-Warp | Cooldown, animations, particles, effects. Action bar, sounds, permission, limits, and more!
body:
![22](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f574488f092ce453f95c49e1054d20ca8b2c391a.png)

# 🌟 OutRequestTeleport — Ultimate Teleportation System

The most advanced, all-in-one teleportation system for Minecraft. Combining RTP, TPA, Homes, and Warps in a single, beautifully crafted plugin with stunning effects and complete customization.



--- ## 🌟 About OutRequestTeleport **OutRequestTeleport** is not just another teleportation plugin — it's a **complete teleportation ecosystem** for your Minecraft server. Unlike standard plugins that offer basic functionality, OutRequestTeleport combines **four major systems** (RTP, TPA, Homes, and Warps) into one seamless experience with cinematic animations, stunning visual effects, and unparalleled customization options. Whether you're running a small survival server with friends or a large network with hundreds of players, OutRequestTeleport adapts to your needs with its flexible configuration system and performance-optimized code. --- ## ✨ Feature Showcase ### 🎯 Core Systems | System | Description | |--------|-------------| | **🎲 RTP (Random Teleport)** | Advanced random teleportation with safe location finding, biome verification, and stunning visual effects | | **🤝 TPA (Teleport Requests)** | Complete request system with accept/deny, here/toggle, auto-accept, and request management | | **🏠 Homes System** | Multi-home support with per-player limits, descriptive names, and home management | | **📍 Warps System** | Create public warps with permissions, economy support, and warp listing | ### 🛡️ Protection & Safety | Feature | Description | |---------|-------------| | **Safe Teleportation** | Advanced location finding with block and biome verification to ensure safe landing | | **Move Cancellation** | Automatically cancel teleport if player moves during countdown | | **World Blacklist** | Restrict teleportation in specific worlds with blacklist/whitelist modes | | **Height Check** | Optional fast RTP when falling below Y level | | **Anti-Grief Protection** | Prevents teleportation into dangerous locations | ### ✨ Visual & Audio Effects | Feature | Description | |---------|-------------| | **Countdown Animations** | Beautiful countdown with action bar updates and sound effects | | **Particle Effects** | Customizable particles for teleportation, arrivals, and cancellations | | **Custom Sounds** | Configurable sounds for every action — requests, accepts, teleports, errors | | **Potion Effects** | Customizable effects for success or failed teleportation | | **Status Indicators** | Clear visual feedback for all teleportation states | ### ⚙️ Customization | Feature | Description | |---------|-------------| | **Cooldown System** | Per-player cooldowns with bypass permissions and time formatting | | **Economy Support** | Optional Vault integration for warp teleportation costs | | **Auto-Accept System** | Auto-accept teleport requests from trusted players | | **Full Messages Config** | Every single message in the plugin can be customized | | **Multi-World Support** | Different settings per world with flexible configuration | | **Fast RTP** | Automatic teleportation when falling below specified height | ### 👑 Admin Features | Feature | Description | |---------|-------------| | **Player Teleportation** | Teleport other players with `/rtp ` | | **Config Reload** | Reload configuration without server restart | | **Bypass Permissions** | Ignore cooldowns and restrictions with dedicated permissions | | **Home Management** | Set home limits for players with `/homelimit` | | **Warp Management** | Create, edit, and delete warps with permission-based access | | **Instant Teleport** | Special permission for instant RTP without countdown | --- ## 📥 Installation Guide | Step | Action | |------|--------| | 1️⃣ | **Download** — Get the latest `.jar` from [Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/plugin/outrequestteleport) | | 2️⃣ | **Install** — Place the JAR into your server's `plugins/` folder | | 3️⃣ | **Restart** — Restart your server (or use `/reload` if you must) | | 4️⃣ | **Configure** — Edit `plugins/OutRequestTeleport/config.yml` to your liking | | 5️⃣ | **Enjoy!** — Players can now use all teleportation features | > **⚠️ Important:** A full server restart is strongly recommended over `/reload` for optimal performance and to avoid any plugin conflicts. --- ## 📊 bStats Metrics OutRTP uses bStats to collect anonymous usage statistics. This helps us improve the plugin based on real usage data. Below is the live statistics chart for OutRTP:

--- ## 🎮 Commands & Permissions ### 👤 Player Commands #### 🎲 RTP System | Command | Description | Permission | Default | |---------|-------------|------------|---------| | `/rtp` | Random teleport to a safe location | `outrtp.use` | ✅ All players | | `/rtp help` | Show RTP help menu | `outrtp.use` | ✅ All players | | `/rtp cancel` | Cancel active RTP countdown | `outrtp.use` | ✅ All players | #### 🤝 TPA System | Command | Description | Permission | Default | |---------|-------------|------------|---------| | `/tpa ` | Request to teleport to a player | `outrtp.tpa.use` | ✅ All players | | `/tpahere ` | Request a player to teleport to you | `outrtp.tpa.use` | ✅ All players | | `/tpaccept [player]` | Accept an incoming teleport request | `outrtp.tpa.use` | ✅ All players | | `/tpdeny [player]` | Deny an incoming teleport request | `outrtp.tpa.use` | ✅ All players | | `/tpcancel [player]` | Cancel your outgoing teleport request | `outrtp.tpa.use` | ✅ All players | | `/tptoggle` | Toggle whether you receive teleport requests | `outrtp.tpa.use` | ✅ All players | | `/tpautoaccept add ` | Add player to auto-accept list | `outrtp.tpa.use` | ✅ All players | | `/tpautoaccept delete ` | Remove player from auto-accept list | `outrtp.tpa.use` | ✅ All players | | `/tpautoaccept list` | List all auto-accepted players | `outrtp.tpa.use` | ✅ All players | | `/tpautoaccept toggle` | Toggle auto-accept system on/off | `outrtp.tpa.use` | ✅ All players | #### 🏠 Homes System | Command | Description | Permission | Default | |---------|-------------|------------|---------| | `/sethome [name]` | Set a home at your current location | `outrtp.home.use` | ✅ All players | | `/home ` | Teleport to one of your homes | `outrtp.home.use` | ✅ All players | | `/homes` | List all your homes | `outrtp.home.use` | ✅ All players | | `/delhome ` | Delete one of your homes | `outrtp.home.use` | ✅ All players | #### 📍 Warps System | Command | Description | Permission | Default | |---------|-------------|------------|---------| | `/warp ` | Teleport to a public warp | `outrtp.warp.use` | ✅ All players | | `/warps` | List all available warps | `outrtp.warp.use` | ✅ All players | ### 👑 Admin Commands | Command | Description | Permission | Default | |---------|-------------|------------|---------| | `/rtp reload` | Reload plugin configuration | `outrtp.admin` | ❌ Ops only | | `/rtp ` | Randomly teleport another player | `outrtp.admin` | ❌ Ops only | | `/homelimit ` | Set home limit for a player | `outrtp.home.admin` | ❌ Ops only | | `/setwarp ` | Create a new public warp | `outrtp.warp.admin` | ❌ Ops only | | `/delwarp ` | Delete an existing warp | `outrtp.warp.admin` | ❌ Ops only | ### 🔑 Advanced Permissions | Permission | Description | Default | |------------|-------------|---------| | `outrtp.*` | All permissions | ❌ Ops only | | `outrtp.admin` | All admin commands | ❌ Ops only | | `outrtp.bypass.cooldown` | Ignore all cooldowns | ❌ Ops only | | `outrtp.tpa.bypass.toggle` | Bypass `/tptoggle` restriction | ❌ Ops only | | `outrtp.instant` | Use instant RTP without countdown | ❌ Ops only | | `outrtp.instant.bypass.cooldown` | Bypass cooldown for instant RTP | ❌ Ops only | | `outrtp.home.limit.vip` | VIP home limit (10 homes) | ❌ Custom | | `outrtp.home.limit.premium` | Premium home limit (20 homes) | ❌ Custom | | `outrtp.home.limit.unlimited` | Unlimited homes | ❌ Ops only | --- ## ⚙️ Configuration
📁 Core Configuration ```yaml # OutRequestTeleport Configuration # Studio Vissed # Префикс плагина prefix: "&f[&x&E&5&4&1&E&7ᴏ&x&D&1&3&1&D&5ʀ&x&B&D&2&1&C&3q&x&A&9&1&0&B&1ᴛ&x&9&5&0&0&9&Fᴘ&f] &7" # Настройки мира worlds: enabled-worlds: - "lobby" - "OutPlay" blacklist-mode: false # RTP Settings rtp: min-radius: 700 max-radius: 3000 center: "OutPlay,0,0" y-level: mode: "HIGHEST" fixed-level: 64 world: - "OutPlay" effects: on-success: - "HUNGER:100:50" on-fail: - "SLOW:100:3" - "WEAKNESS:100:3" countdown: enabled: true time: 10 cancel-on-move: true cooldown: enabled: true time: 60 bypass-permission: "outrtp.bypass.cooldown" sounds: start-countdown: "BLOCK_NOTE_BLOCK_PLING" teleport-success: "ENTITY_ENDERMAN_TELEPORT" teleport-fail: "ENTITY_VILLAGER_NO" countdown-tick: "BLOCK_NOTE_BLOCK_HAT" particles: enabled: true on-teleport: type: "PORTAL" count: 50 speed: 0.5
